title: pelargonium × pseudozonale
intro: Pelargonium × pseudozonale, also known as the Red Form of Mountain Rose or Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pseudozonale include reducing stress, anxiety, and symptoms of colds and flu, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
